headline: How The Equinix (EQIX) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And AI Demand
summary: Recent analyst work on Equinix has centered on fresh price targets around and above US$1,100, with some bullish cases moving targets by more than US$200 per share. Those higher targets sit alongside a more cautious tone from others who worry the stock’s rally already bakes in optimistic growth and execution assumptions. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting views and what they might mean for your own understanding of the Equinix story. Wall Street's queuing for one rocket...
